patch.value: pm-todos + pm-beads: migrate to registerImporter/registerExporter (importers capability exemplar)
pm-todos/pm-beads implement import/export via registerCommand, so the importers capability has no first-party exemplar and external authors have no model.
Both migrate to api.registerImporter/registerExporter retaining backward-compatible command paths; manifests gain importers capability; tests+SDK.md importer example updated.
pm-todos/pm-beads implement import/export via registerCommand, so the importers capability has no first-party exemplar and external authors have no model.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Unblocked + ready: pm-kfd8 (closed this PR) shipped assertRegisteredImporter/assertRegisteredExporter in src/sdk/testing.ts (match on registrations.importers[].importer / registrations.exporters[].exporter). When pm-todos/pm-beads migrate to api.registerImporter/registerExporter, their package specs should assert via these helpers for non-synthetic first-party importer/exporter exemplars. Finding: no first-party package registers an importer/exporter today, so this item is the real importers-capability exemplar.
